name: FluenSys
strapline: Access to Expertise and Knowledge in Fluid Pumping for Heavy Industry and SMEs
description: Fluensys is an independent engineering consultancy in Central London, specializing in fluid and energy solutions. With over 50 years of combined expertise, we deliver practical, tailor-made solutions for SMEs. Our services include new product development, refurbishments, operations optimization, and specialized training. We're committed to honesty, integrity, and responsibility, providing innovative solutions across water treatment, oil & gas, chemical processing, and renewable energy sectors.
foundingStatement: We are an independent engineering consultancy firm based in Central London, UK. With more than 50 years of Pump & Fluids expertise, we deliver practical, tailor-made solutions to small- and medium-sized businesses.

certifications.title: Member of the British Pump Manufacturers Association
